visual_findings: Structural gates pass or pass_with_warning, but the top-view hole/radius/thread callout stack remains visibly unacceptable.
The generated drawing is improved but still not reference-intent-clean enough for manufacturing release.
cases.required_next_action: Place hole/radius/thread callouts in a protected reference-style leader area and rerun 006 UI screenshot review.

acceptance_rule: Application UI screenshot visual PASS is required before any drawing can be accepted.
